title: timemap
summary: Link relation type "timemap": The Target IRI points to a TimeMap for an Original Resource. Defined in RFC7089.
source_version: IANA registry, Last-Modified: Mon, 12 Jan 2026 18:11:26 GMT

raw_columns.Description: The Target IRI points to a TimeMap for an Original Resource.
raw_columns.Notes:
A TimeMap for an Original Resource is a resource from which
      a list of URIs of Mementos of the Original Resource is available.
